topic.title: “A History of Collaboration: The U.S. Marine Corps and the U.S. Department of State”
topic.body: To commemorate the United States Marine Corps’ 250th birthday celebration in 2025, the Office of the Historian produced a pamphlet that examines the past 250 years of collaboration between the Marines and the nation’s diplomats.
topic.image-description: Image of the cover of the pamphlet, featuring a photograph of the United States Marine Corps War Memorial depicting the famous flag raising at Iwo Jima in February 1945, taken at night, on a blue background
topic.image-source-information: Created by the Office of the Historian
